display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Three lines maximum. The `.hero-grid` section.

headline.purpose: Section-opening statements. Once per major content block.

title.purpose: Feature names, product names, card headings. Instrument Sans.

body.purpose: Primary reading copy. Max 65–75ch line length.

label.purpose: Machine-originated data only: version strings, statuses, log lines, CLI copy, timestamps.

shadows.name: hover-reveal
shadows.purpose: Applied on hover to cards and capability rows. The amber outline ring is the tell.

shadows.name: button-primary-hover
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover ring: amber at 15% opacity.

shadows.name: modal-backdrop
shadows.purpose: Modal focus lock. Only blur in the system. Not decorative.

shadows.name: pulse-ring
shadows.purpose: Heartbeat pulse for live connection indicators. dd-integration-pulse.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions and reveals. Ease-out-quart equivalent.

motion.name: ease-simple
motion.purpose: Simple state changes where precision easing is unnecessary.

motion.name: fade-up
motion.purpose: Scroll-reveal entrance. opacity: 0 + translateY(20px) to resting state.

motion.name: nav-underline
motion.purpose: Nav link 1px amber underline grows on hover.

motion.name: gold-shimmer
motion.purpose: Background-position shift on .gold-shimmer text. One-off hero motif only.

motion.name: scan-line
motion.purpose: Subtle gold scan-line sweep on instrument panels. Opacity 0.015.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Deep charcoal fill, bone text, 2px radius. Amber ring surfaces on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Start free trial <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="m12 5 7 7-7 7"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #1a1512; color: #fafaf9; padding: 16px 32px; border-radius: 2px; border: none; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), transform 0.1s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(201,168,76,0.15), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c9a84c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Transparent fill, ink border at 15% opacity, amber tint on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: #1a1512; padding: 14px 32px; border-radius: 2px; border: 1px solid rgba(26,21,18,0.15); font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease, transform 0.1s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: rgba(201,168,76,0.4); background: rgba(201,168,76,0.15); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c9a84c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sharp Card
components.description: Default container. 2px radius, hairline border, amber reveal ring on hover. Never nested.
components.html:
TITAN ROLLOUT
Progressive Delivery
Route traffic to new versions with surgical precision. Canary, blue/green, or cohort-pinned rollouts.
components.css: .ds-sharp-card { background: #fafaf9; border: 1px solid #e5e2dc; border-radius: 2px; padding: 24px; transition: border-color 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; } .ds-sharp-card:hover { border-color: rgba(201,168,76,0.3); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), 0 0 0 1px rgba(201,168,76,0.06); } .ds-sharp-card__label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #c9a84c; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-sharp-card__title { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1512; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-sharp-card__body { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.65; color: #3d3530; max-width: 65ch; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Machine-readable status indicator. 1px radius, mono font, signal-color tinted.
components.html: stable canary rolling back
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 1px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.5625rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-badge--stable { color: rgba(34,197,94,0.9); background: rgba(34,197,94,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.2); } .ds-badge--canary { color: rgba(201,168,76,0.85); background: rgba(201,168,76,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2); } .ds-badge--danger { color: rgba(239,68,68,0.9); background: rgba(239,68,68,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.2); } .ds-badge--deploy { color: rgba(59,130,246,0.9); background: rgba(59,130,246,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.2); }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Transparent at top. On scroll: near-white background with hairline bottom border. Amber underline on hover.
components.html:
DeployTitan
ProductsSolutionsPricing
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 48px; height: 64px; background: transparent; border-bottom: 1px solid transparent; transition: background 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease; } .ds-nav--scrolled { background: rgba(250,250,249,0.9); border-bottom-color: #e5e2dc; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); } .ds-nav__brand { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1512; } .ds-nav__links { display: flex; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav__link { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #3d3530; text-decoration: none; position: relative; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav__link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -2px; left: 0; width: 0; height: 1px; background: #c9a84c; transition: width 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-nav__link:hover { color: #1a1512; } .ds-nav__link:hover::after { width: 100%; }

components.name: Mono Label
components.description: Machine-readable section label. JetBrains Mono, all-caps, amber, wide tracking. Used for panel section headers and categorical tags.
components.css: .ds-mono-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.5625rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9e9189; }

components.name: Corner Accent Container
components.description: Blueprint motif: 12×12px right-angle marks at two opposing corners in precision amber at 30% opacity. Used sparingly on feature sections.
components.css: .ds-corner-accent { position: relative; } .ds-corner-accent::before, .ds-corner-accent::after { content: ''; position: absolute; width: 12px; height: 12px; border-color: #c9a84c; opacity: 0.3; } .ds-corner-accent::before { top: 0; left: 0; border-top: 1.5px solid; border-left: 1.5px solid; } .ds-corner-accent::after { bottom: 0; right: 0; border-bottom: 1.5px solid; border-right: 1.5px solid; }

components.name: Instrument Panel
components.description: Terminal-style data panel. Header bar with mono label, main content area with signal-colored data, event log. The signature component.
components.html:
DeployTitan — Traffic Control
All traffic on v1.4.2 — stable
Active versions
v1.4.2stable100%
components.css: .ds-panel { background: #fafaf9; border: 1px solid rgba(229,226,220,0.5); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; } .ds-panel__header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 8px 16px; background: rgba(245,244,241,0.6); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(229,226,220,0.5); } .ds-panel__header-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-panel__icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; background: #1a1512; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 1px; color: #fafaf9; } .ds-panel__status { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-panel__status-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 1px; } .ds-panel__body { padding: 20px; } .ds-panel__version-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-top: 8px; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 1px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size: 8px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-badge--stable { color: rgba(34,197,94,0.9); background: rgba(34,197,94,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.2); }

narrative.overview:
DeployTitan's visual language is built on a single premise: aircraft-grade precision. Every surface reads like a cockpit display, purposeful and calibrated, nothing decorative. The color system uses two registers: a bone-warm neutral field that recedes, and one operational accent (precision amber) that appears only where it earns its place. Type is set in two voices: Inter for authority at scale, Instrument Sans for legibility at reading size, and JetBrains Mono for the machine layer that runs beneath both.

The system is explicitly dark-capable. Light mode reads like a technical data sheet printed on aged cartridge paper; dark mode reads like a mission-critical terminal at 2am. Neither is an afterthought. Both are deployed via the .dark class toggle; every token has a matching dark override. The 2px corner radius is non-negotiable: it signals precision without rigidity, and it distinguishes DeployTitan from the soft-edged SaaS world it explicitly rejects.

This system does not do friendly. It does not do playful. It does authoritative, calm, and specific. Engineers scanning for technical depth and leaders scanning for capability scope should both find exactly what they need, without the system trying to appeal to either with artificial warmth.
keyCharacteristics: Single sharp radius (2px) applied universally; zero soft corners
Precision amber accent used at ≤10% of any surface; its rarity is the point
Mono layer (JetBrains Mono) reserved strictly for machine-readable content
Noise texture overlay (opacity 0.02) adds material depth without decoration
Blueprint grid motifs signal engineered structure, not ornamentation
Full dark mode parity: every token has an override; behavior is identical, atmosphere differs

rules.name: The Amber Rarity Rule
rules.body: Precision amber is used on ≤10% of any screen. Every use must earn its place by directing attention to something operationally significant. Decorative amber is forbidden.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Extremes Rule
rules.body: #000000 and #ffffff never appear. Every neutral is tinted toward the amber hue. Pure black on pure white erases the system's material character.

rules.name: The Mono Boundary Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono is used only when the content originated from a machine or system. Human-authored labels use Instrument Sans. Mixing registers violates the information hierarchy.

rules.name: The Tracking Inversion Rule
rules.body: Display and headline type uses negative tracking. Label mono type uses positive tracking. Body is set at normal. Never apply positive tracking to large type.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: No element has a box-shadow at rest. Shadows are state transitions, not baseline styles.

rules.name: The Single-Blur Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter: blur() is used only on .cap-modal-backdrop as a focus-lock mechanism. Not a glass card treatment.

dos: Do use border-radius: 2px on every interactive surface.
Do set amber only for operationally significant UI: primary CTA, active states, hover rings, status highlights.
Do use JetBrains Mono strictly for machine-originated content.
Do keep body copy to 65–75ch max line length.
Do apply prefers-reduced-motion to every animation.
Do use the surface color step (surface → surface-alt) for depth. Elevation is tonal at rest.
Do write copy that is specific, direct, and without superlatives.
donts: Don't use soft corners (≥4px radius). The system is 2px everywhere.
Don't use #000 or #fff. Every extreme neutral must be tinted.
Don't use amber as a decorative color: no amber card fills, no amber section backgrounds.
Don't use glassmorphism. The modal backdrop blur is a focus-lock, not a glass aesthetic.
Don't replicate the SaaS cream + purple aesthetic (Notion/Linear/Loom).
Don't replicate dark neon DevOps: terminal-green on black, aggressive gradients.
Don't replicate enterprise boring: navy blue dashboards, stock photo heroes.
Don't use gradient text on any element except the single .gold-shimmer hero motif.
Don't use border-left or border-right wider than 1px as a colored stripe on cards.
Don't animate layout properties. Animate opacity and transform only.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing. All easing is ease-out-quart or ease-out.
